div.class: d-flex w-100 h-100 bg-light position-relative overflow-hidden
position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 bg-dark bg-opacity-50 d-md-none

div.t-attf-class: bg-white border-end shadow-sm flex-column overflow-y-auto transition-all #{this.state.isSidebarOpen ? 'position-fixed top-0 start-0 d-flex h-100' : 'd-none d-md-flex h-100'}

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-2 d-md-none shadow-sm
list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between transition-all w-100
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'territory' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

div.class: d-flex flex-column ps-4 mt-1 pe-2 gap-1 border-start ms-3 border-2 border-light mb-1

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'territory' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'areas' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'territory' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'routes' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'territory' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'shops' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between transition-all w-100
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'warehouse' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

div.class: d-flex flex-column ps-4 mt-1 pe-2 gap-1 border-start ms-3 border-2 border-light mb-1

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'warehouse' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'inventory' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'warehouse' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'management' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'warehouse' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'taxes' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between transition-all w-100
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'operations' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

div.class: d-flex flex-column ps-4 mt-1 pe-2 gap-1 border-start ms-3 border-2 border-light mb-1

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'operations' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'checkins' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'operations' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'orders' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'operations' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'performance' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'operations' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'deliveries' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between transition-all w-100
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'financials' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

div.class: d-flex flex-column ps-4 mt-1 pe-2 gap-1 border-start ms-3 border-2 border-light mb-1

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'financials' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'money' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'financials' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'cash' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'financials' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'invoices' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'financials' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'credit' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'financials' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'pnl' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start d-flex align-items-center justify-content-between transition-all w-100
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'schedules' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

div.class: d-flex flex-column ps-4 mt-1 pe-2 gap-1 border-start ms-3 border-2 border-light mb-1

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'schedules' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'schedules' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded text-start py-2 px-3 small transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'schedules' and this.state.activeSubTab === 'targets' ? 'color: #0f172a; background-color: #e2e8f0; font-weight: 700;' : 'color: #6b7280; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded mb-2 text-start d-flex align-items-center transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'transactions' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded mb-2 text-start d-flex align-items-center transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'staff' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

button.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action border-0 rounded mb-2 text-start d-flex align-items-center transition-all
button.t-att-style: this.state.activeTab === 'settings' ? 'background-color: #0f172a; color: #ffffff;' : 'color: #4b5563; background-color: transparent;'

div.class: d-md-none bg-white p-3 border-bottom d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center shadow-sm flex-shrink-0

button.class: btn btn-light border shadow-sm px-2 py-1
